infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Tabylga uses your location to show nearby places and generate routes from your current position.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Tabylga uses the camera to scan merchant QR codes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Tabylga can attach photos to reviews when you choose images from your library.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Tabylga uses Bluetooth for offline payment handshakes with nearby merchants.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Tabylga uses Bluetooth for offline payment handshakes with nearby merchants.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Tabylga to use your location to show nearby places and generate routes.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Tabylga to use your camera to scan merchant QR codes.
